subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 784687099/251113027 is not a GRB
body:
L. Scotton (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 784687099/251113027 at 00:38:14.12 UT
on 13 November 2025, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to distant particles."
